pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
Define the multi-module structure by adding template-commons, hello-service, and user-service modules to the parent POM.
Remove the explicit project.build.sourceEncoding property, likely relying on Maven defaults or parent configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore custom project backup files to keep the repository clean.

docker/README.md.general_idea: Update documentation to reflect the renaming of the main build script from 'do.sh' to 'remal.sh'.
Update local hostname mappings to use the new 'hello.com' domain and add entries for Vault.
Update references to the PKI server hostname from 'ca.remal.com' to 'pki.remal.com'.
Update the relative path to the Forgerock Directory Server documentation.
Add a new section explaining how to trust self-signed certificates in Firefox for local development.
docker/README.md.human_impl: ### 3.4) Setting Up Certificate Authorities (CA) in Firefox

docker/README.md.general_idea: Add documentation describing the naming convention and execution order for init and startup scripts.
Add a table defining image types (Base, Core, Infrastructure, Application) and their script prefix ranges.
Add a table listing specific images, their types, and assigned script prefix ranges.
Add a troubleshooting tip for testing HTTPS connections using curl.
Add troubleshooting instructions for replacing BusyBox wget/curl with GNU versions.
Add a command snippet for restarting JAR applications inside a container.
Add an example command for SSHing into the Vault container.
Reorganize and renumber the Annex sections to accommodate new content and improve logical flow.

docker/build.sh.general_idea: Update the setenv.sh sourcing to pass an additional domain argument required for the new build configuration.
Add a detailed summary of build parameters and image details at the end of the script for better visibility.
docker/build.sh.human_impl: printf "Image has been built successfully. Details:\n" ...

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Renamed the Certificate Authority service from 'ca' to 'pki' to better reflect its function.
Updated the PKI service image tag to use a standardized naming convention.
Parameterized the PKI service hostname and container name using DOMAIN_NAME variable.
Replaced hardcoded EasyRSA environment variables with configurable variables.
Updated the Directory Server image tag to use a standardized naming convention.
Parameterized the Directory Server hostname and container name using DOMAIN_NAME variable.
Added dependency on the PKI service for the Directory Server.
Changed the exposed ports for the Directory Server to avoid conflicts or align with new standards.
Refactored Directory Server environment variables to use PKI_HOST and new backup/restore settings.
Updated the backup volume path for the Directory Server to a new workspace location.
Added a new Access Management (ForgeRock AM) service.
Added a new HashiCorp Vault service.
Added a new HashiCorp Consul service.
Added a new Java 21 runner service for hello-service-1.
Added a new Java 21 runner service for user-service-1.
Added a new Java 21 runner service for user-service-2.
